name: Joy Behar
description: American comedian, television host, actress and writer
abstract: Josephine Victoria "Joy" Behar (; née Occhiuto; born October 7, 1942) is an American comedian, television host, actress, and playwright. She co-hosts the ABC talk show The View, on which she has appeared since the beginning of the series.

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I was doing weddings at the same time, meeting people, just meeting people. ... So then I started singing at Catch a Rising Star comedy club in between comedians, many of whom you know, including like Joy Behar, Susie Essman, all these people who used to — we all had 15 minute slots
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
